mxCell.value: Feature Modules (Registration, Administration, Manager, Staff, Settings, Inventory, Sales, Communication)
Identity and Core Service (accounts, pharmacies, branches, applications, staff, roles, inventory)
Core Layer Authentication state, route protection, cross-cutting services
Shared Layer Domain services and reusable presentational components
On a later expired-token response, the client renews the token pair and retries the request transparently before the user notices
User navigates to a role-scoped area
Wait, within a bounded period, for role resolution to complete
Does role match the required role?
Progress is preserved locally between stages, so an interrupted registration can be resumed

diagram.name: Fig 8 - Administrator Review and Approval Workflow
Fig 11 - Branch and Pharmacy Management Workflow

mxCell.value: Designate default branch for future sign-ins
Create, edit, or remove branches (address, map location, photograph)
Synchronized update across navigation bar, workspace switcher, and dashboards
The same real-time channel also carries typing indicators, presence, and voice-message delivery

diagram.name: Fig 16 - Inventory and Sales Data Workflow

mxCell.value: Manager or Staff opens Inventory / Sales
Load summary figures (stock position or transaction stats)
Load searchable, filterable, paginated item / transaction list
Apply search, status/source, or date-range filters
Generate PDF, Excel, or CSV of the filtered data set
Select one or more transactions, then generate a formatted receipt (browser print, sales only)
Workspace switch to a different branch
Invitation link created and shown for copying
Listed under Pending Invitations (revocable at any time)
Redirect to sign-in, then return to invitation
Branch assignment created; session refreshed with new access

diagram.name: Fig 20 - Role and Permission Management Workflow

mxCell.value: Admin (platform-wide) or Manager (pharmacy-scoped) opens Roles & Permissions
Open permission-assignment matrix grouped by functional module
Toggle individual permissions or whole modules at once
Changes held locally; pending add/remove count shown
Role becomes available when assigning or inviting staff
System role, or role outside scope, redirects here to a read-only view

diagram.name: Fig 22 - Client-Backend Communication and File Handling Flow

mxCell.value: 8: resolve viewable link when display is needed
